title: Enloperito's CPvP Pack
description: A clean and optimized PvP pack for crystal combat with custom swords, better beds, custom heart, galactic hotbar and a precise crosshair for better visibility and smoother gameplay.
body: A custom Minecraft PvP pack designed for crystal PvP, featuring optimized swords, clear beds, and a unique crosshair. Improves visibility and performance for smoother, more precise combat gameplay. Clean smooth and aesthetic.![Netherite/Diamond Armour, Sword, Obsidian And Crystal Preview İn The Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e86d9600d248b80816ae7134b81583dffde41171.png)
